name: NavList
description: Vertical label-only nav list — labelled block where each row carries a label and trailing chevron, and routes via `href` / `onClick`. Bundles a [Header](../header/header.md) over a [List](../list/nav.md). Reach for it on category indexes, settings menus, and 'pick a sub-page' surfaces.

embedded.description: Composition mode flag. When `true` (or when NavList is a direct child of `.chorus-section` / `.chorus-feed`), the list enters **embedded mode**: zeroes its own `background` + `padding` so chrome defers to the host.

headerAction.description: { label, href?, onClick? } — trailing accent Text Button in the header. Extend the header when there's an index page to route to.

items.description: Array of nav row descriptors forwarded to [List](../list/nav.md) `variant="nav"`: { value, label, supportingText?, href?, onClick?, trailingIcon? }.

container.description: Surface block holding the header above the vertical nav list.

header.description: [Header](../header/header.md) `size="large"` — section label leading, optional `accent` Text Button trailing.

list.description: [List](../list/nav.md) `variant="nav"`. Embedded so the wrapper section owns the rail. Each row is the interactive route target; the trailing chevron is supplied by the nav variant.

row.description: Single nav row rendered by [List](../list/nav.md). The label is the primary content; the trailing chevron (`ChevronDownIcon` rotated to `right` by the nav variant) signals drill-in. Each row routes via `href` or `onClick`.

sizing.headerActionRendersAs: Button variant='text' size='xsmall' appearance='accent' — link-affordance accent rule.
sizing.rowComposition: list/nav row — label.md primary, optional caption.md supporting line, family-default min-height (ref.space.600 = 48), inline.md gap, trailing chevron at sys.icon.md / onSurfaceVariant.
sizing.rowInlinePaddingNote: Each row keeps the list/nav native sys.layout.container.md inline padding (the tap target reaches the surface edge) and adds margin-inline: calc(-1 * sys.layout.container.md) so the visible label lines up with the section's content rail (aligned with the header label at 16 from the surface).
sizing.dividerInset: sys.layout.container.md from the row's leading edge — anchors at the row's text column start.

trailingIcon.description: Override the default trailing chevron with a custom glyph (e.g. external-link).

states.note: Each row is the interactive target — hover / pressed / focused / disabled tokens delegate to [List](../list/nav.md). The headerAction is an accent Text Button (its own state contract). Container has no interactive state.

focusIndicator.description: Rows take the family-wide Inward focus ring; headerAction paints its own Outward ring.
focusIndicator.compositionReason: Rows tile the column with a hairline divider; an outward ring would overlap divider and neighbour row.

behavior.headerRequired: Every NavList carries a label; the optional headerAction extends the header with a trailing accent Text Button.
behavior.verticalScroll: No pager. The full list scrolls in normal document flow.
behavior.rowRoutes: Each row routes via `href` (rendered as `<a>`) or `onClick`. Trailing chevron is decorative.

forbidden: leading thumbnail or icon — NavList rows are intentionally label-only; reach for DirectoryList or List variant="image" when a leading visual is needed
header omitted — every NavList carries a label
